channel.title: Loopback Social — Community News
channel.description: Events and announcements shared across the Loopback Social community network.

item.title: 오는 8월 29일, UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026이 한국마이크로소프트에서 개최됩니다! / UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 will be held at Microsoft Korea on August 29!
item.description: [KO] 오는 8월 29일, UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026이 한국마이크로소프트에서 개최됩니다! [EN] UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 will be held at Microsoft Korea on August 29! Event: 2026-08-29T00:00:00.000Z — 2026-08-29T08:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 발표 제안서 모집 (6/5 까지) / UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 Call for proposals (Until June 5)
item.description: [KO] UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 발표 제안서 모집 (6/5 까지) [EN] UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 Call for proposals (Until June 5) Event: 2026-05-18T15:00:00.000Z — 2026-06-05T14:59:59.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: 🚀 [dot4] 매달 모이는 닷넷 이야기 · 5월 / 🚀 [dot4] Monthly .NET Talks · May
item.description: [KO] 🚀 [dot4] 매달 모이는 닷넷 이야기 · 5월 [EN] 🚀 [dot4] Monthly .NET Talks · May Event: 2026-05-12T04:30:00.000Z — 2026-05-28T08:30:00.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: 🚀 Ship to Production: 오픈 프로젝트 시즌 III 모집🔥 (~5/25 마감) / 🚀 Ship to Production: Open Project Season III Recruitment🔥 (Deadline: 5/25)
item.description: [KO] 🚀 Ship to Production: 오픈 프로젝트 시즌 III 모집🔥 (~5/25 마감) [EN] 🚀 Ship to Production: Open Project Season III Recruitment🔥 (Deadline: 5/25) Event: 2026-05-02T15:00:00.000Z — 2026-05-25T14:59:59.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: Ubuntu 26.04 LTS Release Party & InstallFest @daejeon - 5월 2일 대전 스타창작소 5층 / Ubuntu 26.04 LTS Release Party & InstallFest @daejeon - May 2, Daejeon SC Art Hall 5F
item.description: [KO] Ubuntu 26.04 LTS Release Party & InstallFest @daejeon - 5월 2일 대전 스타창작소 5층 [EN] Ubuntu 26.04 LTS Release Party & InstallFest @daejeon - May 2, Daejeon SC Art Hall 5F Event: 2026-05-02T04:00:00.000Z — 2026-05-02T08:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: 부산IT모각코와 함께 하는 .NET Universe: Busan Edition, 2604 / .NET Universe: Busan Edition, 2604 with Busan IT Mogakko
item.description: [KO] 부산IT모각코와 함께 하는 .NET Universe: Busan Edition, 2604 [EN] .NET Universe: Busan Edition, 2604 with Busan IT Mogakko Event: 2026-04-16T15:00:00.000Z — 2026-04-25T13:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: .NET Universe 2026 다시 보기 영상이 순차 공개됩니다. 페이지에서 확인해 보세요. / Replay videos for .NET Universe 2026 are being released in sequence. Check the event page for updates.
item.description: [KO] .NET Universe 2026 다시 보기 영상이 순차 공개됩니다. 페이지에서 확인해 보세요. [EN] Replay videos for .NET Universe 2026 are being released in sequence. Check the event page for updates. Event: 2026-03-29T15:00:00.000Z — 2026-12-31T15:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

item.title: 뉴스나 커뮤니티 링크를 제보하세요! 여기를 클릭해서 알려주세요. / Submit news or community links! Click here to let us know.
item.description: [KO] 뉴스나 커뮤니티 링크를 제보하세요! 여기를 클릭해서 알려주세요. [EN] Submit news or community links! Click here to let us know. Event: 2019-12-31T15:00:00.000Z — 2099-12-31T14:59:59.000Z Category: announcement
